title: Creating Folders
drDigitalIntro: Folders help you stay organized. You can create new folders for different parts of your life: Family, Bills, Recipes, Photos, Work. Right-click in Finder and choose New Folder, or use File > New Folder. Then give your folder a clear name. Once you have folders, you can move files into them so everything is organized by topic.
drDigitalSuccess: You can now organize your computer like a filing cabinet!
drDigitalHint: Create folders for the things that matter to you — photos, documents, recipes, whatever you save most.
